data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Transfer/revoke controls', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The absence of concrete evidence to support the existence of transfer/revoke controls leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of transfer/revoke controls implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
